value.found_quote: Plugins are namespaced bundles that allow you to extend Antigravity's capabilities by grouping skills, rules, MCP servers, and hooks into a single package.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Antigravity plugins as namespaced bundles that group skills, rules, MCP servers (Model Context Protocol), and hooks into a single package. The Supported Components section confirms MCP Servers configured via mcp_config.json, directly substantiating the claim. The page presents this as current functionality.
